Class Character

java.lang.Object
main.Character
public class Character extends Object
This class lays the groundwork for all characters It controls the core of the character, including alignment, sex, race, and name

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    Character.Alignment
    Represents the alignment system and choices a character has
    static enum 
    Character.Sex
    Represents the available biological sexes for character generation.

  • Method Details

    • setRace

      public void setRace(Race race)
      Sets the race of the character being created
      Parameters:
      race - The race chosen by the player

    • getRace

      public Race getRace()
      Gets the races of the character assigned to it
      Returns:
      the race of the character

    • setJob

      public void setJob(Job job)
      Sets the job chosen by the player
      Parameters:
      job - The job chosen for the character

    • setSex

      public void setSex(Character.Sex sex)
      Sets the sex of the character
      Parameters:
      sex - The sex chosen by the player

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the name of the character
      Parameters:
      name - The chosen name of the character
